categories.label: Token milestone
categories.description: Will a token reach a market-cap target (or flip another token) before a deadline?
categories.disclosure: Resolves from DexScreener market cap on Base. Outcome locks YES the instant the target is reached. Not financial advice.

markets.question: Will $CARDS reach $100M market cap by July 10, 2026 at 11:59 PM UTC?
markets.summary: A native Hunch YES/NO market for the $CARDS run to $100M. It resolves YES the moment $CARDS's Dexscreener market cap touches $100M at any point before the deadline; otherwise NO. $CARDS is a Solana token — its cap is read live by mint address, never the ticker, so the look-alike CARDS tokens cannot cross-resolve it — and at creation it sits near $78.8M, roughly 1.27× below the $100M line.

markets.question: Will $ANSEM close green on all 7 daily candles from July 4–10, 2026?
markets.summary: A native Hunch YES/NO market on whether $ANSEM (ANSEM “The Black Bull”, the Solana pump.fun token 9cRCn9rG…TGpump) prints a GREEN daily candle on every one of the 7 UTC days from July 4 through July 10, 2026. A daily candle is green when its CLOSE is above its OPEN — and since $ANSEM trades 24/7 with no gap, each UTC day’s open is the previous day’s close, so a green candle means that day’s close beat the day before. Resolves NO the moment ANY of the 7 candles closes red (close at or below its open); resolves YES only if all 7 candles close green. The July-4 candle’s open is $ANSEM’s July-3 daily close. Once per day, ~40 minutes after the 00:00 UTC daily candle close, $ANSEM’s DexScreener FDV (which for this fixed-supply token moves 1:1 with price) is recorded as that candle’s close — only the close counts, never an intraday wick. Winners split the entire pool pro-rata (parimutuel). $ANSEM sat ~$103M FDV at creation.

markets.question: Will $ANSEM close above a $100M FDV on at least 10 daily candles in July 2026?
markets.summary: A native Hunch YES/NO market on whether $ANSEM (ANSEM “The Black Bull”, the Solana pump.fun token 9cRCn9rG…TGpump) closes above a $100M fully-diluted valuation on at least 10 daily candles during July 2026. Only the CLOSE of each UTC daily candle counts — an intraday spike (wick) above $100M that falls back before the candle closes does NOT count. Once per day, ~40 minutes after the 00:00 UTC daily candle close, $ANSEM's DexScreener fully-diluted valuation is recorded as that candle's close; YES if at least 10 of July's daily closes are at or above $100M FDV, otherwise NO. Winners split the entire pool pro-rata (parimutuel). $ANSEM sat ~$98.5M FDV at creation.

categories.label: Market-cap range
categories.description: Which market-cap range will a token close inside at the deadline (a strike ladder)?
categories.disclosure: Resolves to the single range containing the token's DexScreener market cap on Base at the close. Winners split the pool pro-rata (parimutuel). Not financial advice.

markets.question: Which market-cap band will $ADA close in this week?
markets.summary: Always-on weekly ladder: at the close of each UTC week, which percentage band will $ADA's market cap land in versus where it opened? The bands recenter every round. This round runs 2026-06-29T00:00:01.000Z → 2026-07-05T23:59:59.000Z (UTC); it resolves automatically from CoinGecko spot market cap and the next week is already live at this same link.

categories.label: Real-world event
categories.description: Will a real-world event happen before a deadline (e.g. an official token launch)?
categories.disclosure: Resolves manually from official communications and a consensus of credible reporting. Not financial advice.

markets.question: Will Base still settle more than 90% of x402 transactions on July 30, 2026?
markets.summary: A native Hunch YES/NO market on x402, the agentic-payment protocol where AI agents pay for APIs and services in USDC. Base once settled ~90% of all x402 transactions, but Solana has closed the gap — the two chains are now neck-and-neck on transaction count. This market resolves YES only if Base re-consolidates above a 90% share of x402 transactions by July 30, 2026, and NO otherwise. Settled by Hunch from public on-chain x402-by-chain data.

markets.question: Will Base officially launch a token by December 31, 2026?
markets.shortTitle: Base launches a token by Dec 31, 2026
markets.summary: A native Hunch YES/NO market on whether Base ships its own officially sanctioned token — live, publicly transferable, and tradable — on or before December 31, 2026. Announcements, roadmaps, and testnet placeholders do not count. Settled by Hunch from official Base communications and a consensus of credible reporting.

markets.question: Will Solana flip Base in x402 payment volume by December 31, 2026?
markets.shortTitle: Solana flips Base in x402 volume
markets.summary: A native Hunch YES/NO market on the x402 agentic-payment race. Base has led x402 USDC payment volume since launch, but Solana has been catching up fast. This market resolves YES if Solana's x402 payment volume overtakes Base's at any point on or before December 31, 2026, and NO otherwise. Settled by Hunch from public on-chain x402-by-chain data.

categories.label: On-chain activity
categories.description: Will a product's on-chain usage (payments / transactions, cumulative or single-day) reach a milestone before a deadline?
categories.disclosure: Resolves from a public Dune Analytics query over indexed Base on-chain data (payment / transaction counts). Locks YES the instant the cumulative or single-day count reaches the target. Not financial advice.

markets.question: When will $GRID reach a $1M market cap?
markets.summary: A native multi-outcome Hunch market: pick the window in which $GRID (CodeGrid, on Base) first reaches a $1,000,000 market cap. $GRID is ~$160K today — about 16% of the way, a ~6x move — read live from its most-liquid DexScreener pair. Resolves to the window containing the first CONFIRMED $1M crossing (a second reading ≥30 min later guards against a flash wick) — early-locking the instant it happens — or to “After July 21” if $GRID hasn't reached $1M by July 21, 2026. Winners split the entire pool pro-rata (parimutuel).

markets.question: Will Surplus Intelligence process 60,000 payments in a single day before July 30, 2026?
markets.summary: A native Hunch YES/NO market on a Surplus Intelligence single-day record. Resolves YES the instant any UTC day on or before July 30, 2026 sees SI process 60,000 or more payments — otherwise NO at the deadline. Daily payment counts come from a public Dune Analytics query over indexed Base on-chain data. SI's best day so far is ≈44,428 payments, so 60,000 is a new high well above the current peak.

markets.question: Will Surplus Intelligence process 1,500,000 cumulative payments by July 30, 2026 at 11:59 PM UTC?
markets.summary: A native Hunch YES/NO market on Surplus Intelligence's adoption. Resolves YES the instant SI's cumulative payments processed reaches 1,500,000 at any settlement tick on or before July 30, 2026 — otherwise NO at the deadline. Payments are counted from a public Dune Analytics query over indexed Base on-chain data, summed per UTC day across the whole history. SI has already processed ≈552,600 payments and is adding roughly 24,000 a day.

markets.question: Will Surplus Intelligence process 1,500,000 cumulative transactions by July 30, 2026 at 11:59 PM UTC?

Transactions are counted from a public Dune Analytics query over indexed Base on-chain data, summed per UTC day across the whole history. SI has already processed ≈555,900 transactions and is adding roughly 27,000 a day.

markets.question: When will BlockRun.ai first hit 750,000 transactions in a single day?

markets.question: Will 100 agents declare wallets via the Agent Wallet Manifest before August 2026?
markets.summary: A native Hunch YES/NO market on AI-agent wallet adoption. Resolves YES the instant 100 agents have declared a wallet via the Agent Wallet Manifest at any settlement tick on or before August 1, 2026 (00:00 UTC) — otherwise NO at the deadline. The live count is read straight from the public Agent Wallet Manifest API (the agents_with_manifest_declared_wallets metric); Hunch reads the raw number and applies the 100-agent line itself, so settlement never depends on the partner's own call. At creation 23 agents had declared.

markets.question: Will $ANSEM be the most-traded token every week of July 2026?
markets.summary: A native Hunch YES/NO market: will $ANSEM be the single most-traded token by volume for every week of July 2026? “July” counts every Monday-labeled week that overlaps the month — the five weeks beginning Jun 29, Jul 6, 13, 20 and 27. The weekly leader is read from a public Dune Analytics query (7856079), which lists the top token by volume each week. Resolves NO the instant any of those weeks closes with a different #1 token — the moment $ANSEM loses a week — and YES only if $ANSEM tops all five. $ANSEM led the week of Jun 22 with ≈$8.0M; weekly leaders rotate hard, so a full-July sweep is far from certain. The target is matched by mint address (9cRCn9…pump), not symbol.

markets.question: Will FOMO record more than $100M of volume in at least one week of July 2026?
markets.summary: A native Hunch YES/NO market on FOMO's weekly trading volume. Resolves YES the instant any week overlapping July 2026 records more than $100,000,000 in volume — otherwise NO once July's weeks have closed. Volume is read from a public Dune Analytics query (5673933), one row per Monday-labeled week. “July” counts every week that overlaps the month — the five weeks beginning Jun 29, Jul 6, 13, 20 and 27. Recent weeks have run ≈$55–69M; FOMO has only ever cleared $100M in a single week in January–February 2026 (a $125M peak), which is outside July and does not count.

markets.question: How many times will Base stop producing blocks before 2027?
markets.summary: A native multi-outcome Hunch market: how many times will Base go DOWN — stop producing blocks for at least 15 minutes — between launch and December 31, 2026 (UTC)? Pick the count band. Outages are detected automatically from Base's own mainnet blocks over JSON-RPC: a quorum of independent public RPCs is polled and an outage is counted only when every reachable endpoint's chain tip is stale, so a single flaky node can't fabricate one. Only outages that BEGIN after this market opens count — any outage already in progress at launch is excluded, so “0 times” stays a live outcome. Resolves at the deadline to the band containing the final outage count; winners split the entire pool pro-rata (parimutuel).

categories.description: Will a 100-flip round land Heads majority, Tails majority, or an exact 50–50 Tie?
categories.disclosure: Provably fair: each flip = keccak256(seed, i) & 1 from a seed derived off-chain from a public drand beacon (League of Entropy) — non-riggable and independently verifiable. 3-way parimutuel; winners split the pool pro-rata. Not financial advice.

markets.question: Will this 100-flip round land Heads, Tails, or an exact Tie?
markets.summary: Always-on live-momentum coin flip: every 5 minutes a round flips a coin 100 times (one every 3 seconds), streaming live. Bet Heads majority, Tails majority, or an exact 50–50 Tie (3-way parimutuel). Bets lock 60 seconds before the close. Each flip = keccak256(seed, i) & 1 from a seed derived off-chain from a public drand beacon (League of Entropy) — provably fair and independently verifiable. Rounds run back-to-back forever at this same link.
